description: Style Note Beautiful ethnic sets, intricately designed and with finesse in the finish, this will set of your outfit nicely and complete your ethnic ensembles. Product Detailsjewellery setnecklace: Bluish green beaded chain, has a square golden pendant with intricate design that resembles a wedding procession through the forest and a green base, bluish green beads dangling from the pendant and a hook closure behindEarring: Golden coloured base with intricately designed detail of two people sitting on an elephant, has green background and bluish green bead danglers from the baseMaterial and CareMetalWipe with a cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength of the necklace: 33 cmLength of the earring: 28 mm
